The Second Book of Ibn Haldun Published by Iber Publications Meets the Readers

10.05.2022

Ibn Haldun’s another book (1332 – 1406) was published by Iber Publications.

Famous historian, sociologist, philosopher, politician and statesman Ibn Haldun’s another book (1332 – 1406) was published by Iber Publications.

The work can be obtained from selected bookstores and online book sales sites.
